positive: A highly stylized and elegant central composition depicting a cosmic forest scene. The main subjects are abstract, stylized crystalline trees with bioluminescent flora and glowing root structures, set against a nebula-filled twilight sky. The scene must have strong, clean silhouettes against a deep, moody background (navy, indigo, deep violet). Focus on vibrant, saturated jewel tones (cyan, magenta, emerald) contrasting sharply with deep blacks and purples. The style should be a mix of Art Deco geometry and psychedelic watercolor painting, highly detailed, symmetrical, and suitable for seamless textile printing. Center composition, volumetric lighting, volumetric fog effect, ultra-detailed, high contrast, 8k, concept art.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, asymmetrical, cropped, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, poorly rendered, cartoonish, photorealistic, disfigured
